src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Refactor RedisServer to extend AbstractRedisInstance to share common lifecycle logic.
Remove dependency on Guava library by removing imports and usage.
Remove dependency on internal JarUtil utility class.
Add Lombok dependency for logging annotation.
Add dependency on common constants utility.
Remove the inner Builder class and associated configuration logic.
Remove the inner enum for OS-specific executable detection.
Remove manual process start/stop and readiness check logic, delegating to parent.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.human_impl: -public synchronized void start() ... -public synchronized void stop() ...

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Add new constructor accepting a RedisServerExecProvider for flexible executable sourcing.
Add debug logging for server arguments in constructors.
Update the regex pattern for detecting Redis server readiness to be more robust.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.human_impl: +private static final String REDIS_READY_PATTERN = ".*(R|r)eady to accept connections.*";

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Change the builder method to return a new RedisServerBuilder class instead of the removed inner class.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.human_impl: +public static RedisServerBuilder builder() { return new RedisServerBuilder(); }

src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.general_idea: Capture the boolean return value of File.setExecutable to handle potential permission failures gracefully.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.human_impl: boolean ret = command.setExecutable(true); if (ret) { return command; } else { return null; }

src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.general_idea: Reformat code indentation from 4 spaces to 2 spaces to match project style.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.human_impl: Changed leading whitespace from 4 spaces to 2 spaces for all lines in the method.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.general_idea: Reorder import statements to group standard library imports before third-party imports.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/util/JarUti.human_impl: Moved java.io imports above com.google.common and org.apache.commons imports.

src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and assertions with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the newer testing framework.
Introduce Lombok @Slf4j annotation to simplify logging setup in the test class.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 dependency to utilize RandomUtils for port generation.
Add Google Guava dependency to utilize Resources for accessing test resources.
Extract common setup logic into a @BeforeEach method to initialize host and port dynamically.
src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.human_impl: @BeforeEach public void setUp() { host = CommonConstant.DEFAULT_REDIS_HOST; port = RandomUtils.nextInt(10000, 60000); }

src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @Test(timeout) with JUnit 5 @Timeout annotation for better compatibility.
Replace JUnit 4 @Test(expected) with JUnit 5 Assertions.assertThrows for more precise exception testing.
Add new test cases to verify custom Redis executable provider configuration and error handling.
src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.human_impl: public void shouldOverrideDefaultExecutable() { ... } public void shouldFailWhenBadExecutableGiven() { ... }

src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Add a new test case to verify the Redis server ready pattern matching logic against sample output.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 11 to support the new JDK version.
Upgrade Jedis client from 2.1.0 to 3.3.0 to ensure compatibility with modern Redis features and Java 11.
Upgrade Guava from 18.0 to 29.0-jre to use a version compatible with Java 11.
Upgrade Commons IO from 2.4 to 2.7 for bug fixes and modern API support.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 3.11 as a new dependency.
Add Apache Commons Collections4 4.4 as a new dependency.
Add Google Gson 2.8.6 as a new dependency.
Add Project Lombok 1.18.12 to reduce boilerplate code.
Add Commons BeanUtils 1.9.4 as a new dependency.
Add Commons Codec 1.14 as a new dependency.
Add Commons Compress 1.20 as a new dependency.
Add Hutool 5.4.1 utility library as a new dependency.
Add SLF4J Simple 1.7.30 for logging implementation.
Upgrade Mockito to 3.5.2 and add JUnit Jupiter integration for modern testing.
Replace JUnit 4 with JUnit Jupiter 5.6.2 for modern test framework support.
Add Awaitility 4.0.3 for asynchronous testing support.
Remove Spring Data Redis dependency to simplify the project scope.
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.8.1 and configure it for Java 11.
Upgrade Maven Surefire Plugin to 2.22.2 to support JUnit 5.
Add Maven Checkstyle Plugin 3.1.1 with Google style checks for code quality.
Add Spotless Maven Plugin 2.27.2 for automatic code formatting.
Upgrade Maven Javadoc Plugin to 3.2.0 and configure encoding.
Upgrade Maven Source Plugin to 3.2.1.
Add Nexus Staging Maven Plugin 1.6.8 for deploying to Sonatype OSS.
Add Maven GPG Plugin 1.6 for signing artifacts during release.
Upgrade Maven Release Plugin to 2.5.3.
Add JaCoCo Maven Plugin 0.8.5 for code coverage reporting.
Update groupId, version, and developer information to reflect the new project ownership.
Change distribution management from Clojars to Sonatype Nexus for OSS release.

README.md.general_idea: Update the Maven dependency snippet to reflect the new groupId (org.signal) and version (0.8.0) for the forked library.
Add a 'Fork Notes' section explaining that this is a fork of ozimov/embedded-redis updated to Redis 6.0.5.
README.md.human_impl:
Fork Notes
==============
This repository is a fork of https://github.com/ozimov/embedded-redis...

README.md.general_idea: Modernize usage examples to use the new fluent API (RedisServer.builder) and RedisExecProvider instead of direct constructor arguments.
Add documentation and code examples for the new Redis Cluster support, including ephemeral and predefined port configurations.
Update the 'Redis version' section to state that the jar now includes Redis 6.0.5 binaries for Linux/macOS and explicitly drop Windows support.
README.md.human_impl:
- Redis 6.0.5 for Linux/Unix (amd64 and x86)
- Redis 6.0.5 for macOS (amd64)
... Windows binaries are not included...

README.md.general_idea: Add a comprehensive Changelog section detailing changes from version 0.2 to 0.8.1.
Add a Contributors section listing the original authors and contributors of the library.
Add a License section specifying the Apache License, Version 2.0.
